loading.title: The Reminiscent
loading.description: The project "The Reminiscent" originated years ago from my reading of John Hejduk’s Victims. That was an conceptual architectural project intended to be realized over thirty years, a monumental tribute to the ordinary souls who perished across turbulent eras. My aspiration is to transpose the scenes described in the book into a series of train carriages. As the train moves slowly forward, it carries those obscure, long-forgotten memories — departing from the old days, traversing the present, and journeying into the depths of eternity.
